+import Foundation
+
+struct CleanupRequest: Sendable {
+    let text: String
+    let cleanupEnabled: Bool
+    let prompt: String
+    let modelID: String
+    let frontmostWindowContextEnabled: Bool
+    let windowContext: String?
+    let preferredTranscriptionsDraft: String
+    let commonlyMisheardDraft: String
+}
+
+struct CleanupDiagnosticTranscript: Equatable, Sendable {
+    let systemPrompt: String
+    let framedInput: String
+    let rawModelOutput: String
+}
+
+struct CleanupResult: Equatable, Sendable {
+    let text: String
+    let usedFallback: Bool
+    let modelDuration: TimeInterval?
+    let postProcessDuration: TimeInterval?
+    let diagnosticTranscript: CleanupDiagnosticTranscript?
+}
+
+protocol CleanupProcessing: AnyObject, Sendable {
+    func cleanup(_ request: CleanupRequest) async -> CleanupResult
+}
+
+protocol CleanupInferencePerforming: Sendable {
+    func isAvailable() async -> Bool
+
+    func infer(
+        input: String,
+        prompt: String,
+        modelID: String,
+        thinkingMode: CleanupThinkingMode
+    ) async throws -> String
+}
+
+final class CleanupPipeline: CleanupProcessing, Sendable {
+    private let inferenceBackend: any CleanupInferencePerforming
+    private let timeout: Duration
+    private let sleep: @Sendable (Duration) async throws -> Void
+
+    init(
+        inferenceBackend: any CleanupInferencePerforming,
+        timeout: Duration = .seconds(15),
+        sleep: @escaping @Sendable (Duration) async throws -> Void = { duration in
+            try await Task.sleep(for: duration)
+        }
+    ) {
+        self.inferenceBackend = inferenceBackend
+        self.timeout = timeout
+        self.sleep = sleep
+    }
+
+    func cleanup(_ request: CleanupRequest) async -> CleanupResult {
+        guard request.cleanupEnabled else {
+            return CleanupResult(
+                text: request.text,
+                usedFallback: true,
+                modelDuration: nil,
+                postProcessDuration: nil,
+                diagnosticTranscript: nil
+            )
+        }
+
+        let effectivePrompt = Self.effectivePrompt(from: request.prompt)
+        let corrections = Self.parseCorrections(
+            preferredDraft: request.preferredTranscriptionsDraft,
+            misheardDraft: request.commonlyMisheardDraft
+        )
+        let correctedText = Self.applyDeterministicCorrections(
+            to: request.text,
+            corrections: corrections
+        )
+        let framedInput = "<USER-INPUT>\(correctedText)</USER-INPUT>"
+        let assembledPrompt = Self.assembledPrompt(
+            basePrompt: effectivePrompt,
+            corrections: corrections,
+            frontmostWindowContextEnabled: request.frontmostWindowContextEnabled,
+            windowContext: request.windowContext
+        )
+
+        guard await inferenceBackend.isAvailable() else {
+            return fallbackResult(text: correctedText)
+        }
+
+        let rawOutput: String
+        do {
+            let modelStart = Date()
+            rawOutput = try await runInference(
+                framedInput: framedInput,
+                prompt: assembledPrompt,
+                modelID: request.modelID
+            )
+            let modelDuration = Date().timeIntervalSince(modelStart)
+            let diagnosticTranscript = CleanupDiagnosticTranscript(
+                systemPrompt: assembledPrompt,
+                framedInput: framedInput,
+                rawModelOutput: rawOutput
+            )
+
+            let postProcessStart = Date()
+            let sanitizedOutput = Self.sanitizedOutput(from: rawOutput)
+            guard Self.isUsable(sanitizedOutput) else {
+                return fallbackResult(text: correctedText, diagnosticTranscript: diagnosticTranscript)
+            }
+
+            let postProcessDuration = Date().timeIntervalSince(postProcessStart)
+            return CleanupResult(
+                text: sanitizedOutput,
+                usedFallback: false,
+                modelDuration: modelDuration,
+                postProcessDuration: postProcessDuration,
+                diagnosticTranscript: diagnosticTranscript
+            )
+        } catch {
+            return fallbackResult(text: correctedText)
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func runInference(
+        framedInput: String,
+        prompt: String,
+        modelID: String
+    ) async throws -> String {
+        let raceState = CleanupInferenceRaceState()
+
+        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { continuation in
+            let inferenceTask = Task { [inferenceBackend, raceState] in
+                do {
+                    let output = try await inferenceBackend.infer(
+                        input: framedInput,
+                        prompt: prompt,
+                        modelID: modelID,
+                        thinkingMode: .suppressed
+                    )
+                    raceState.finish {
+                        continuation.resume(returning: output)
+                    }
+                } catch {
+                    raceState.finish {
+                        continuation.resume(throwing: error)
+                    }
+                }
+            }
+
+            Task { [sleep, timeout, raceState] in
+                do {
+                    try await sleep(timeout)
+                } catch {
+                    return
+                }
+
+                inferenceTask.cancel()
+                raceState.finish {
+                    continuation.resume(throwing: CleanupPipelineError.timedOut)
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func fallbackResult(
+        text: String,
+        diagnosticTranscript: CleanupDiagnosticTranscript? = nil
+    ) -> CleanupResult {
+        CleanupResult(
+            text: text,
+            usedFallback: true,
+            modelDuration: nil,
+            postProcessDuration: nil,
+            diagnosticTranscript: diagnosticTranscript
+        )
+    }
+
+    private static func effectivePrompt(from prompt: String) -> String {
+        let trimmedPrompt = prompt.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
+        return trimmedPrompt.isEmpty ? SettingsStore.defaultCleanupPrompt : prompt
+    }
+
+    private static func assembledPrompt(
+        basePrompt: String,
+        corrections: ParsedCleanupCorrections,
+        frontmostWindowContextEnabled: Bool,
+        windowContext: String?
+    ) -> String {
+        var sections = [basePrompt]
+
+        if let correctionHints = correctionHintsSection(from: corrections) {
+            sections.append(correctionHints)
+        }
+
+        if
+            frontmostWindowContextEnabled,
+            let windowContext,
+            !windowContext.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty
+        {
+            sections.append(
+                """
+                <OCR-RULES>
+                Treat window text as supporting disambiguation context only. Prefer the spoken words, correct likely misrecognitions of names, commands, files, and jargon when the screen makes the intended term obvious, and never summarize or rewrite the window content.
+                </OCR-RULES>
+                """
+            )
+            sections.append(
+                """
+                <WINDOW-OCR-CONTENT>
+                \(String(windowContext.prefix(4_000)))
+                </WINDOW-OCR-CONTENT>
+                """
+            )
+        }
+
+        return sections.joined(separator: "\n\n")
+    }
+
+    private static func correctionHintsSection(from corrections: ParsedCleanupCorrections) -> String? {
+        var lines: [String] = []
+        lines.append(contentsOf: corrections.preferredTranscriptions.map { "- \($0)" })
+        lines.append(contentsOf: corrections.misheardReplacements.map { "- \($0.wrong) -> \($0.right)" })
+
+        guard !lines.isEmpty else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return """
+        <CORRECTION-HINTS>
+        \(lines.joined(separator: "\n"))
+        </CORRECTION-HINTS>
+        """
+    }
+
+    private static func parseCorrections(
+        preferredDraft: String,
+        misheardDraft: String
+    ) -> ParsedCleanupCorrections {
+        var preferred = [String]()
+        var preferredSeen = Set<String>()
+        for line in preferredDraft.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
+            let phrase = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
+            guard !phrase.isEmpty else {
+                continue
+            }
+            let normalized = phrase.lowercased()
+            guard preferredSeen.insert(normalized).inserted else {
+                continue
+            }
+            preferred.append(phrase)
+        }
+
+        var replacements = [CleanupReplacement]()
+        var replacementSeen = Set<String>()
+        for line in misheardDraft.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
+            let parts = String(line)
+                .components(separatedBy: "->")
+                .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines) }
+            guard parts.count == 2 else {
+                continue
+            }
+
+            let wrong = parts[0]
+            let right = parts[1]
+            guard !wrong.isEmpty, !right.isEmpty else {
+                continue
+            }
+
+            let key = "\(wrong.lowercased())->\(right.lowercased())"
+            guard replacementSeen.insert(key).inserted else {
+                continue
+            }
+            replacements.append(CleanupReplacement(wrong: wrong, right: right))
+        }
+
+        return ParsedCleanupCorrections(
+            preferredTranscriptions: preferred,
+            misheardReplacements: replacements
+        )
+    }
+
+    private static func applyDeterministicCorrections(
+        to text: String,
+        corrections: ParsedCleanupCorrections
+    ) -> String {
+        let protectedPhrases = corrections.preferredTranscriptions.sorted {
+            $0.count > $1.count
+        }
+
+        var protectedText = text
+        var sentinels: [String: String] = [:]
+        for (index, phrase) in protectedPhrases.enumerated() {
+            let sentinel = "__GP_PROTECTED_\(index)__"
+            let pattern = phrasePattern(for: phrase)
+            protectedText = replacingMatches(
+                in: protectedText,
+                pattern: pattern,
+                with: sentinel
+            )
+            sentinels[sentinel] = phrase
+        }
+
+        let sortedReplacements = corrections.misheardReplacements.sorted {
+            $0.wrong.count > $1.wrong.count
+        }
+        var correctedText = protectedText
+        for replacement in sortedReplacements {
+            correctedText = replacingMatches(
+                in: correctedText,
+                pattern: phrasePattern(for: replacement.wrong),
+                with: replacement.right
+            )
+        }
+
+        for (sentinel, phrase) in sentinels {
+            correctedText = correctedText.replacingOccurrences(of: sentinel, with: phrase)
+        }
+        return correctedText
+    }
+
+    private static func phrasePattern(for phrase: String) -> String {
+        let trimmedPhrase = phrase.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
+        guard !trimmedPhrase.isEmpty else {
+            return "^$"
+        }
+
+        let escapedPhrase = NSRegularExpression.escapedPattern(for: trimmedPhrase)
+        var pattern = ""
+        if isWordCharacter(trimmedPhrase.first) {
+            pattern += "(?<![\\p{L}\\p{N}])"
+        }
+        pattern += escapedPhrase
+        if isWordCharacter(trimmedPhrase.last) {
+            pattern += "(?![\\p{L}\\p{N}])"
+        }
+        return pattern
+    }
+
+    private static func replacingMatches(
+        in text: String,
+        pattern: String,
+        with replacement: String
+    ) -> String {
+        guard let expression = try? NSRegularExpression(
+            pattern: pattern,
+            options: [.caseInsensitive]
+        ) else {
+            return text
+        }
+
+        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
+        let matches = expression.matches(in: text, range: range)
+        guard !matches.isEmpty else {
+            return text
+        }
+
+        var result = text
+        for match in matches.reversed() {
+            guard let replacementRange = Range(match.range, in: result) else {
+                continue
+            }
+            result.replaceSubrange(replacementRange, with: replacement)
+        }
+        return result
+    }
+
+    private static func sanitizedOutput(from rawOutput: String) -> String {
+        let withoutReasoningBlocks = replacingMatches(
+            in: rawOutput,
+            pattern: "(?is)<think\\b[^>]*>.*?<\\/think\\s*>",
+            with: ""
+        )
+
+        let withoutOrphanStartTag: String
+        if
+            withoutReasoningBlocks.range(
+                of: "(?is)<\\/think\\s*>",
+                options: .regularExpression
+            ) == nil
+        {
+            withoutOrphanStartTag = replacingMatches(
+                in: withoutReasoningBlocks,
+                pattern: "(?is)^\\s*<think\\b[^>]*>",
+                with: ""
+            )
+        } else {
+            withoutOrphanStartTag = withoutReasoningBlocks
+        }
+
+        return withoutOrphanStartTag.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
+    }
+
+    private static func isUsable(_ output: String) -> Bool {
+        let trimmed = output.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
+        return !trimmed.isEmpty && trimmed != "..."
+    }
+
+    private static func isWordCharacter(_ character: Character?) -> Bool {
+        guard let character else {
+            return false
+        }
+
+        return character.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy(CharacterSet.alphanumerics.contains)
+    }
+}
+
+private struct ParsedCleanupCorrections {
+    let preferredTranscriptions: [String]
+    let misheardReplacements: [CleanupReplacement]
+}
+
+private struct CleanupReplacement {
+    let wrong: String
+    let right: String
+}
+
+private enum CleanupPipelineError: Error {
+    case timedOut
+}
+
+private final class CleanupInferenceRaceState: @unchecked Sendable {
+    private let lock = NSLock()
+    private var finished = false
+
+    func finish(_ action: () -> Void) {
+        let shouldFinish = lock.withLock { () -> Bool in
+            guard !finished else {
+                return false
+            }
+
+            finished = true
+            return true
+        }
+
+        guard shouldFinish else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        action()
+    }
+}

+@MainActor
+private final class FakeCleanupLLM: CleanupLLMControlling {
+    struct Call: Equatable {
+        let input: String
+        let thinkingMode: CleanupThinkingMode
+    }
+
+    var temperature: Float = 0
+    var update: @Sendable (String?) -> Void = { _ in }
+    var updateThinking: @Sendable (String?) -> Void = { _ in }
+    var postprocess: @Sendable (String) -> Void = { _ in }
+    var outputs: [String] = []
+    var shouldSuspend = false
+    private(set) var recordedPrompts: [String] = []
+    private(set) var calls: [Call] = []
+
+    private var suspendedContinuation: CheckedContinuation<String, Never>?
+
+    func setSystemPrompt(_ prompt: String) {
+        recordedPrompts.append(prompt)
+    }
+
+    func respond(to input: String, thinking: CleanupThinkingMode) async -> String {
+        calls.append(.init(input: input, thinkingMode: thinking))
+
+        if shouldSuspend {
+            return await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                suspendedContinuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+
+        return outputs.isEmpty ? "" : outputs.removeFirst()
+    }
+
+    func resumeSuspendedResponse(with output: String) {
+        shouldSuspend = false
+        let continuation = suspendedContinuation
+        suspendedContinuation = nil
+        continuation?.resume(returning: output)
+    }
+}

+private final class CleanupPipelineInferenceBackend: @unchecked Sendable, CleanupInferencePerforming {
+    struct Call: Equatable {
+        let input: String
+        let prompt: String
+        let modelID: String
+        let thinkingMode: CleanupThinkingMode
+    }
+
+    var available = true
+    var nextResponses: [String] = []
+    var nextError: Error?
+    var shouldSuspend = false
+
+    private let lock = NSLock()
+    private var calls: [Call] = []
+
+    private var suspendedContinuation: CheckedContinuation<String, Error>?
+
+    func infer(
+        input: String,
+        prompt: String,
+        modelID: String,
+        thinkingMode: CleanupThinkingMode
+    ) async throws -> String {
+        let state = lock.withLock { () -> (Error?, Bool, String?) in
+            calls.append(
+                Call(
+                    input: input,
+                    prompt: prompt,
+                    modelID: modelID,
+                    thinkingMode: thinkingMode
+                )
+            )
+            let nextError = self.nextError
+            self.nextError = nil
+            let shouldSuspend = self.shouldSuspend
+            let nextResponse = nextResponses.isEmpty ? nil : nextResponses.removeFirst()
+            return (nextError, shouldSuspend, nextResponse)
+        }
+
+        if let nextError = state.0 {
+            throw nextError
+        }
+
+        if state.1 {
+            return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { continuation in
+                lock.withLock {
+                    suspendedContinuation = continuation
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        if let nextResponse = state.2 {
+            return nextResponse
+        }
+
+        return ""
+    }
+
+    func isAvailable() async -> Bool {
+        lock.withLock {
+            available
+        }
+    }
+
+    func resumeSuspendedInference(with output: String) {
+        let continuation = lock.withLock { () -> CheckedContinuation<String, Error>? in
+            let continuation = suspendedContinuation
+            suspendedContinuation = nil
+            shouldSuspend = false
+            return continuation
+        }
+
+        continuation?.resume(returning: output)
+    }
+
+    func recordedCalls() -> [Call] {
+        lock.withLock {
+            calls
+        }
+    }
+}
